description_long: This is a pair of athletic sneakers featuring a dynamic and colorful design. The upper is primarily black mesh with vibrant accents, including a purple plastic cage overlay, yellow heel tab, and a yellow Nike swoosh on the toe box. The midsole is white with sculpted, wavy details in pink and teal, adding a playful touch. The laces are thick, white, and patterned, threaded through the purple cage for secure fastening. The outsole is rugged and multi-colored, designed for traction and durability. The overall appearance is modern, sporty, and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments.
description: A pair of black athletic sneakers with bold purple, yellow, pink, and teal accents, featuring a white midsole and patterned laces.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the yellow heel tab, black upper, and sculpted white midsole with teal outsole details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the purple cage overlay, yellow swoosh, and wavy pink and teal midsole accents.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the yellow swoosh on the toe box, thick patterned laces, and symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible purple cage, yellow heel tab, and colorful midsole.
attribute_logo: Yellow Nike swoosh on the toe box and purple cage overlay on both sides.
